title: Server Error when uploading binary image to tmpfiles.org
symptom: When attempting to upload a binary image to tmpfiles.org using the HTTP Request node, a 500 Server Error is returned.
not_this_if: Error occurs with a different node or service
root_cause: The server may not be able to process the request due to an invalid file name or format. If the binary data does not have a proper file name or extension, the server might reject the request, resulting in a 500 error.
fix_steps: Ensure the binary data has a valid file name and extension in the node that generates it.
If necessary, use a Code node to set the file name before the HTTP Request node.
agent_instruction: Check and set a valid file name for the binary data before uploading.
